channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sam Docherty's Journey Through Cancer, Football, and Life After Sport
item.description: Sam Docherty's AFL career was marked by relentless challenges, including two cancer diagnoses, multiple injuries, and a grueling rehabilitation process. Despite these hardships, he carved out a 13-yea...

item.title: Oscar Sudi Criticizes Jackson Mandago Over Scholarship Scandal Acquittal
item.description: Kapseret MP Oscar Sudi has criticized former Uasin Gishu governor Jackson Mandago even after his acquittal in the KSh 1.1 billion Finland scholarship scandal. Sudi argued that parents who paid for the...

item.title: Supreme Court Transfers NAB Cases to Federal Constitutional Court
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan has ruled that it cannot hear bail applications in pending National Accountability Bureau (NAB) appeals, transferring all such cases to the Federal Constitutional Court (...

item.title: Women coerced into swinging: BBC investigation reveals widespread abuse
item.description: A BBC News investigation has uncovered the experiences of 50 women who claim they were pressured or coerced by their partners into participating in swinging. Many reported engaging in sexual acts agai...

item.title: Greek seafarer rescued after dramatic maritime operation off Cape Town
item.description: A 38-year-old Greek seafarer is recovering in hospital after being rescued from the sea off Cape Town by a Good Samaritan fishing crew. The incident occurred when the man fell overboard from a bulk ca...

item.title: Mastering Professional Communication in the Workplace
item.description: The article critiques how education systems fail to prepare individuals for adult professional communication challenges, particularly in workplace dynamics. It highlights the disconnect between academ...

item.title: First Lady Promotes Akwete Weaving Heritage in Abia State
item.description: The First Lady, Mrs. Remi Tinubu, recently visited Abia State to champion the preservation of the traditional Akwete weaving craft. During her tour, she announced a significant donation of N2 billion ...

item.title: Calgary family searches for missing autistic boy amid community support efforts
item.description: An 11-year-old boy from Calgary, Alberta, remains missing nearly a week after going missing, sparking an extensive search by local authorities and the community. The child, who has autism, was last se...

item.title: Spain's 2026 World Cup Victory Highlights the Power of Teamwork
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup saw Spain clinch victory over Argentina, emphasizing that teamwork triumphs over individual talent. The article highlights how Spain's success stemmed from collective effort, t...

item.title: Marathi Show Aga Aai Aaho Aai Explores Motherhood and Family Dynamics
item.description: The Marathi show Aga Aai Aaho Aai on Zee5 intricately portrays the nuances of motherhood through the lens of Shreya, a newlywed woman navigating her relationship with her birth mother Janaki and mothe...

item.title: Mike Sonko Details Tensions Over Northlands City Drainage Project with Uhuru Kenyatta
item.description: Mike Sonko, former Nairobi governor, has revealed how his friendship with Uhuru Kenyatta soured over the Northlands City development project. The multi-billion-shilling initiative, backed by Kenyatta'...

item.title: Anne Curtis Set to Collaborate with Kapamilya Stars in ASAP Australia Shows
item.description: Anne Curtis, renowned for her role as a host and actress in ABS-CBN's 'ASAP' franchise, is set to join Kapamilya stars in the upcoming Australian edition of the popular show. The collaboration marks a...

item.title: 19th-century travelogue details a hermit's pilgrimage to Himalayan sacred sites
item.description: This excerpt from 'The Forest of Snow' by Swami Ramananda Bharati recounts a 19th-century hermit's journey from Joshimath in the Garhwal Himalayas to the sacred sites of Mount Kailash and Manas Sarova...

item.description: The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) has called for the maintenance of open straits amid escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, which have cast a shadow over regional st...

item.title: Ted Cruz Accuses Nigeria of Using Lobbyists to Conceal Christian Killings and Insecurity
item.description: Senator Ted Cruz of the United States has accused Nigeria's President Bola Tinubu government of using public relations lobbying to hide the killing of Christians in the country. Cruz criticized Nigeri...

item.title: CASA investigation reveals pilot's reckless conduct in fatal 2019 helicopter crash
item.description: Seven years after a near-death helicopter crash involving high-profile tourism operator Troy Thomas, the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA) has concluded an investigation finding the pilot's actio...

item.title: Merebank NPO supports girls' education through sanitary pad distribution
item.description: The Merebank-based non-profit organisation Save the Dignity of Our School Girls has distributed over 30,000 sanitary pads to empower girls to stay in school and combat menstrual stigma. Founded in 202...
